game.title: Harvest Scream
game.short_description: A co-op farming horror game about raiding unstable dimensions for seeds to grow and harvest for a hungry monster's daily quota.
game.long_description:
Harvest Scream is a high-tension, 1 to 5 player co-op farming horror game where your job is simple: feed the beast, or become its next meal.

You and your crew have been hired by an evil scientist to look after a hungry monster brought from another dimension that only eats crops. Activate capsules to select your destination, drive your tractor into dangerous dimensions, and dig up seeds from rocks. Bring them back to the farmhouse, grow them quickly, and harvest enough food to meet the monster's daily calorie quota before your shift ends.

FARMING & HORROR ARE BETTER WITH FRIENDS

Gather your friends and work as a team to manage the farm and survive the unknown. Whether you are coordinating calorie counts, dividing daily chores, or running for your life as everything goes wrong, this unique mix of farming and survival makes for a great co-op adventure.

THE DAILY GAME LOOP

  • Dimension Raiding: Select a dimension at the capsule each morning and drive your tractor out into the unknown. Manage your fuel to stay longer, solve puzzles to progress, and dig up seeds while calculating their total calorie value on the fly.

  • Survive Unique Entities: Every dimension holds a different threat. Face a variety of terrifying monsters and strange creatures. You must stay alert, adapt to their behaviors, and focus on survival while getting your work done.

  • The Shift Deadline: If you hit the quota before your shift ends, the monster is happy and you sleep safely. Fail to meet it, and a strange fog will sweep across the farm, leaving your crew with nowhere to hide.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR FARMHOUSE

Don't spend all your money on the corporate quota. Earn extra cash to buy funny hats, cosmetics, and decorations for your farmhouse.

CHOOSE YOUR DIFFICULTY

Tailor the game to your playstyle. Whether you want to chill out in a calm mode or dive straight into an action-packed farming nightmare, the choice is yours. Push your limits and track your highest survived day right on the main menu leaderboards!
